name: keel
description: Discipline that survives compaction: durable memory rituals (handover · lessons · tasks), staged verification gates before bulk runs, and hooks that block secret leaks + dangerous commands. Installs the TOOLING — 12 /keel-* skills, 3 subagents (researcher · verifier · auditor), memory + safety hooks. A plugin CANNOT ship permissions or docs, so also clone github.com/muratsilahtaroglu/claude-code-starter-kit to get rules.md, the HANDOVER/LESSONS/TASKS/PLAN memory files, and the deny/ask permission rules.
